{# layout.html — project-level layout override for sphinx_rtd_theme. Inherits everything from the base theme; only overrides specific blocks. #} {% extends "!layout.html" %} {# ── Browser tab title ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #} {% block htmltitle %} {{ title }} — {{ project }} {% endblock %} {# ── Sidebar logo / project name area ─────────────────────────────────────── #} {% block sidebartitle %}
{% if logo %} {% endif %} {{ project }} v{{ release }}
{% endblock %} {# ── Footer ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #} {% block footer %}
{{ project }} v{{ release }}  ·  {{ copyright }}
Built with Sphinx  ·  WaveDrom  ·  Graphviz
{% endblock %} {# ── Extra head content (meta tags) ───────────────────────────────────────── #} {% block extrahead %} {{ super() }} {% endblock %}
